segments.text: Take Aaron thy brother, and his sons with him, from among the children of Israel, that he may minister unto me in the priest's office, even Aaron, Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar, Aaron's sons.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make holy garments for Aaron thy brother for glory and for beauty.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Speak unto all that are wise hearted, whom I have filled with the spirit of wisdom, that they may make Aaron's garments to consecrate him, that he may minister unto me in the priest's office.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: These are the garments which they shall make: a breastplate, and an ephod, and a robe, and a broidered coat, a mitre, and a girdle: and they shall make holy garments for Aaron thy brother, and his sons, that he may minister unto me in the priest's office.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They shall take gold, and blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They shall make the ephod of gold, of blue, and of purple, of scarlet, and fine twined linen, with cunning work.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The curious girdle of the ephod, which is upon it, shall be of the same, according to the work thereof; even of gold, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Put in the breastplate of judgment the Urim and the Thummim; and they shall be upon Aaron's heart, when he goeth in before the LORD: and Aaron shall bear the judgment of the children of Israel upon his heart before the LORD continually.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make a plate of pure gold, and grave upon it, like the engravings of a signet, HOLINESS TO THE LORD.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Put them upon Aaron thy brother, and his sons with him; and shalt anoint them, and consecrate them, and sanctify them, that they may minister unto me in the priest's office.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make them linen breeches to cover their nakedness; from the loins even unto the thighs they shall reach.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: their nakedness: Heb. flesh of their nakedness
